name: Stripe

apiKeyAuth.notes: Secret key used for server-side requests. Test mode vs live mode determined by key used. Restricted keys recommended for limited-scope access.

connectOAuth.notes: OAuth is used only for Stripe Connect (Standard accounts). Custom and Express accounts use the Accounts API directly.

auth.notes: Primary auth is API key. Stripe Connect uses OAuth for Standard account onboarding. For Connected accounts, use Stripe-Account header with the account ID (acct_...).

api.rateLimits: Live mode: 100 requests/second (global), 25 requests/second (per endpoint default). Sandbox: 25 requests/second. Files API: 20 read + 20 write/second. Search API: 20 read/second. Connect account creation: 30/second (live), 5/second (sandbox). 429 status with Stripe-Rate-Limited-Reason header.
api.notes: Stripe is primarily a payments API. Person management is for connected account identity verification (KYC), not traditional employee provisioning. Team member management (Dashboard users) is not available via API.

sdk.notes: Official Stripe Node.js SDK. ~7.5M weekly npm downloads. Includes automatic retry for rate limit (429) errors. TypeScript types included.

connectWebhooks.notes: Connect webhooks listen for events on connected accounts. Configure with 'Listen to: Events on Connected accounts' in Dashboard, or set connect=true via API.

security.notes: Verify webhook signatures using the endpoint's signing secret.

sandbox.notes: Free test mode available with every Stripe account. Use test API keys (sk_test_...) to access sandbox. No separate environment needed - same API, different keys. Test clocks available for simulating time-based scenarios.

needs_verification: Whether Stripe Dashboard team member management is available via any API
Accounts v2 API changes and Person Tokensv2 availability
Exact list of all person-related webhook events
Whether rate limits differ by account type or plan
